name: c-cleanup-scaffold
description: Scaffolds free(...) for direct allocations and for caller-owned helper functions that return allocated memory.

commands.title: C Cleanup Scaffold: Refresh Current Document
C Cleanup Scaffold: Scaffold Cleanup For Current Line
C Cleanup Scaffold: Scaffold Cleanup For Function
C Cleanup Scaffold: Remove Scaffold Markers

cCleanupScaffold.enabled.description: Enable automatic cleanup scaffolding for C/C++.

cCleanupScaffold.detectOwnedReturnFuncti.description: Use a lightweight single-return heuristic to treat local helper functions as returning owned memory.

cCleanupScaffold.allocatorFunctions.description: Legacy allocator list. These names use cleanupFunctionName.

cCleanupScaffold.cleanupFunctionName.description: Cleanup function used for owned-return function calls and legacy allocatorFunctions.

cCleanupScaffold.cleanupMap.description: Allocator-to-cleanup mapping for direct assignment lines.

cCleanupScaffold.ownedReturnFunctions.description: Function names treated as returning owned memory that should get an immediate cleanup scaffold.
